Naan oru thadava sonna, nooru thadava sonna mathiri.
Naan eppo varuven, eppadi varuvennu yarkum theriyathu. Aana vara vendiya nerathula correct-aa varuven.
Oru thadava mudivu pannita, en pecha naane kekka maten.
Ongi adicha onrai ton weight da.
Antha area intha area all area-layum aiyya ghilli da.
Kanna, panni thaan kootama varum, singam single-a thaan varum.
Naanum evvalavu naal thaan nallavana nadikkirathu.
